investigator.value: First-person narrator with claimed supernatural sight
investigator.quote: I feel that I have a gift, or something else that allows me to see things that not many or no one else can.

red_herring.value: The focus on 2012 as end times and hurricane signs deflects from the true spiritual battle between good and evil
red_herring.quote: A lot of people say that the years 2012 will be when this world comes to an end. What they are not taking in is

social_world.value: Cosmic hierarchy of God, angels, demons, and humanity with explicit power structures and allegiances
social_world.quote: The chose to serve with the Devil will give you power and glory until the battle takes place

reveal_mechanic.value: Biblical cross and scripture cause supernatural sensations to cease, demonstrating spiritual warfare reality
reveal_mechanic.quote: when I pull out my Bible or hold me cross that I carry around my neck that feeling goes away

media_and_audience.value: Public dismissal of supernatural experiences as mental illness while news media reports increasing evil openly
media_and_audience.quote: I know that sounds like a bunch of non scene and that it is all in my head

investigator_wound.value: Narrator's burden of supernatural sight isolates him and causes others to question his sanity
investigator_wound.quote: I have seen things in the dark and light that would make most people loose their minds
